name: praxis
description: Claude Code skills for the software delivery lifecycle, shipped as one self-contained plugin: the SDLC expert skills + /new-feature orchestrator, plus the skill factory (skill-creator, skill-learner / /learn, /validate-skills) and a versioned memory ledger.

plugins.name: praxis
plugins.description: Self-contained: SDLC expert skills (core six + security, frontend, data, ML/AI, UX specialists) + per-expert commands + /new-feature orchestrator, and the skill factory — skill-creator, skill-learner (/learn) for capturing knowledge gaps as skills, /validate-skills, and the memory ledger. One install, everything included.
